mind.content: Interview prep is so disconnected from real work
mind.why_this_feeling: You feel this way for an unknown reason.

meta_insight.pattern: Frustration arising from a perceived disconnect between the skills or methods required for assessment/preparation and those required for actual performance or real-world application.
meta_insight.principle: Humans are driven by a need for perceived utility and direct relevance in their efforts. When preparatory activities feel artificial or misaligned with the ultimate goal, it leads to demotivation, cognitive dissonance, and a sense of wasted effort.
meta_insight.strategy: When designing assessment or training protocols, explicitly bridge the gap between the simulated environment and real-world application. Clearly articulate the 'why' behind specific tasks, demonstrating how they develop transferable skills or test underlying competencies crucial for the actual job, even if the immediate context differs.

strategy.use_case: When designing assessment or training protocols, explicitly bridge the gap between the simulated environment and real-world application. Clearly articulate the 'why' behind specific tasks, demonstrating how they develop transferable skills or test underlying competencies crucial for the actual job, even if the immediate context differs.
